content_markdown: Which of the following statements, relating to the production of nuclear power, is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: The fuel has high energy density.

options.label: B
options.text: Supplies of nuclear fuels are unlimited.

vibe_explanation: Nuclear fuel (like Uranium-235) has an extremely high energy density compared to fossil fuels, meaning a very small mass produces a large amount of energy. While nuclear power has other issues (finite supplies, radioactive waste), it is known for low greenhouse gas emissions and high energy density.
